lineup_source: Cape Verde vs Spain / Uruguay, World Cup 2026 group stage, June 2026 (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Vozinha (Josimar Dias)
players.note: Born in Mindelo, Sao Vicente, Cape Verde; raised by grandparents there, no record of foreign parentage.

players.name: Wagner Pina
players.note: Born in Portugal to a Cape Verdean diaspora family; no specific detail on individual parents found.

players.name: Roberto Lopes
players.note: Born and raised in Dublin (Crumlin) to Cape Verdean father Carlos and Irish mother Judy.

players.name: Edilson "Diney" Borges
players.note: Born in Tarrafal, Santiago Island, Cape Verde; no record of foreign parentage.

players.name: Sidny Lopes Cabral
players.note: Born in Rotterdam to a Cape Verdean diaspora family; brother Rodny also plays for Cape Verde.

players.name: Kevin Pina
players.note: Born in Praia, Cape Verde; scored the country's first-ever World Cup goal vs Uruguay.

players.name: Jamiro Monteiro
players.note: Born in Rotterdam and raised by Cape Verdean immigrant parents in the Netherlands.

players.name: Telmo Arcanjo
players.note: Born in Lisbon to a Cape Verdean diaspora family; his older brother also represented Cape Verde.

players.name: Jovane Cabral
players.note: Born in Assomada, Santiago Island, Cape Verde; moved to Portugal as a teen for football (Sporting CP academy).

players.name: Ryan Mendes
players.note: Born in Mindelo, Cape Verde; built his club career in France (Le Havre) and holds dual French citizenship; team captain and all-time top scorer.

players.name: Nuno da Costa
players.note: Born in Praia, Cape Verde; family relocated to Portugal when he was about 2 years old, later to France at 13.
